Beguile Plants  

Description

1: Charm up to level 25

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 170 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 6 Recast Time: 12
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 25
Deletable: No Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Plant
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso blinks.

Game Description

Beckons to the plants of the wild, allowing you to control them.

Items with this effect

  • Dark Oak Shillelagh
  • Spell: Beguile Plant
  • Spell: Beguile Plants

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Beguile Plants
Spell: Beguile Plant
ClassLevel
DRU28
Expansion:

Duration:
9.4 mins @L28 to 20.5 mins @L65
  • Comments (21)
  • Scroll 1 Quested (1)
  • Scroll 2 Sold By (1)
  • Scroll 2 Quested (0)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Wanderer Qenda - 5pp 4gp 9sp 3cp
  • Beguile Plants
Add Image
    Post Comment
    It does make sense:
    QuoteReply
    # Oct 20 2013 at 2:07 AM Rating: Decent
    Whit2k
    View User Forum
    43 posts
    It does make sense that there would be some upgrades to this spells, since druids are nature casters.
    ▲ Page top
    It does make sense:
    QuoteReply
    # Oct 20 2013 at 2:56 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1641773856190
    Scholar
    2,308 posts
    Every expansion that comes out, druids go Beta and get to say what they want changed or added in the upcoming expansion. It's as simple as that. Join the next Beta and voice your opinion. All you have to do is convince enough druids in Beta that have the ear of the developers. Good luck.
    ▲ Page top
    No upgrades
    QuoteReply
    # Jan 06 2009 at 1:01 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591785438283
    69 posts
    I never bothered getting this spell. But now there are some higher level zones with some interesting plants. It's a shame we never got an upgrade for plant charm.

    I find I use my animal charm a lot more these days. And if we had a higher plant charm it would make a nice companion with Skin to Vines/Mulch spells.
    ▲ Page top
    No upgrades
    QuoteReply
    # Jan 07 2009 at 11:54 AM Rating: Excellent
    __DEL__1661732332556
    Guru
    6,998 posts
    wrynar wrote:
    I never bothered getting this spell. But now there are some higher level zones with some interesting plants. It's a shame we never got an upgrade for plant charm.

    I find I use my animal charm a lot more these days. And if we had a higher plant charm it would make a nice companion with Skin to Vines/Mulch spells.


    Submit your idea via /feedback in-game.
    ▲ Page top
    who & what
    QuoteReply
    # Nov 29 2006 at 5:05 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591907451985
    5 posts
    I am one of those people that like to have all there spell's rather there worth it or not . If this spell is a quest who is ther quest giver & what are the component's to complete the quest
    ▲ Page top
    who & what
    QuoteReply
    # Nov 29 2006 at 5:40 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591793697396
    View User Forum
    383 posts
    It is the result of a Kunark era quest. See https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/quest.html?quest=419 for more details.
    ▲ Page top
    Where you can use it..
    QuoteReply
    # Aug 18 2005 at 5:13 AM Rating: Excellent
    __DEL__1592766671582
    1 post
    One zone you can make good use of this at( if you get it fairly soon) is the Swamp of No Hope..there are man eating shrubs/ferns/plants/vines in this zone, and I believe the vines are like 23-27 in lvl...I use this zone alot since it is basically empty, and there is alot of good exp to be had in here =)
    ▲ Page top
    still works
    QuoteReply
    # May 11 2005 at 12:35 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592266127909
    View User Forum
    1 post
    did the quest a couple of days ago, it still works! but how to get the components at lvl 28 is a mystery to me. havent found anything yet what can be charmed, will try ot soon
    ▲ Page top
    quest doesnt work anymore
    QuoteReply
    # May 02 2005 at 1:04 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592249895050
    View User Forum
    22 posts
    i tried to do this wuest last night and got all the stuff for it and when i went to FV all there was was dragoons and cliff golems aand no people except pilgrims so dont waste ur time tryin to get this spell
    ▲ Page top
    RE: quest doesnt work anymore
    QuoteReply
    # May 02 2005 at 7:41 PM Rating: Decent
    ChiefsClassik
    Scholar
    471 posts
    Dont give up yet, all the FV towns folk are on the East side of the zone now.

    ▲ Page top
    RE: quest doesnt work anymore
    QuoteReply
    # Aug 18 2005 at 11:40 AM Rating: Default
    __DEL__1591790095641
    View User Forum
    960 posts
    77 cleric?

    (Looking at their sig.)
    ▲ Page top
    Useful in SK
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 26 2004 at 11:20 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591787492985
    Scholar
    139 posts
    So far I found 1 plant I could charm with this spell: A Treant in South Karana.

    Not only was I able to charm the Treant, but the treant stayed charmed for a long long time (I didn't have to recharm, and I just gated when I was done with it, so I wouldn't get a bad faction hit) but, the treant was a good DPS pet (hitting for 52) and cast Druid spells on itself and the other animals I was attacking.

    Additionally, my Sand Eroded Shell (casts Savage Spirit) worked well on the pet and hasted it.
    ▲ Page top
    Pretty much worthless
    QuoteReply
    # Jan 25 2004 at 1:51 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592261186137
    13 posts
    This spell is the result of a quest that at lvl 29 is impossible to do alone anymore. Perhaps when the Frontier Mountains were at the peak of their popularity people could /ooc for the component of this quest that is needed from the sarnak. Otherwise, in 2004 the only way you're going to get this spell is if you are far higher than 29 (in which case what use is the spell?? It only charms lvls 25 and higher!!!) or you have a few high lvl friends that are willing to waste a couple hours of their time for a spell that is worthless the moment you're old enough to use it. Where the hell do you find plants that are lvl 25 and lower?
    ▲ Page top
    RE: Pretty much worthless
    QuoteReply
    # Oct 29 2004 at 12:17 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591818469142
    17 posts
    Er.. 25 and HIGHER? Think you meant lower...

    RE: Pretty much worthless
    QuoteReply
    # Mar 25 2005 at 7:55 PM Rating: Default

    View User Forum
    458 posts
    Says right on lucy max1=25 so yeah highest plant you can charm is 25

    34 posts
    She sells Beguile Animal not Beguile Plant. The latter is a quested spell in FV.
    ▲ Page top
    Use?
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 06 2003 at 5:21 PM Rating: Default
    __DEL__1591787969332
    274 posts
    Ok I'm thinking hard of where there are plants of around level 30 that you would be able to charm. The one zone that comes to mind is OT. The cactus are decent fighters, although slow. Anyone have other suggestions of where is a good spot ot use this spell?
    ▲ Page top
    RE: Use?
    QuoteReply
    # Apr 21 2004 at 8:53 PM Rating: Decent
    Valdon
    674 posts
    Well, runny eye. Would be a BLAST to charm Moldmaster and he could stomp that whole zone and even Lord Picklaw... Any 20 somethign that devours me lvl 35 ranger like nothing, regens every hit as I dish it out would be a fun pet.

    Monster : The Sporali Moldmaster 25 - 25
